p1.note: Flat As-Is with Peti's renames. Safe, no structural changes. Channels still 15 items.

b2.note: Channels back to 17 items. Simpler top-level but messy inside.

d2.note: Lean groups. No separate Channel Settings – simpler but settings scattered.

f3.note: Progressive: best UX. Bounce+Blocklist in Audience novel but sound. Channels clean at 10. Harder sell.

cust5.note: Channel-split approach. Email/Mobile/Web as separate groups. User-created variant.
